zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Audley於大約1249年出生在英國爾時，她的父親James de Audley Justiciar of Ireland30歲，母親Ela de Longespée27歲。她於1274年與John Del Holte II結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她埋葬在英國斯塔福爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Audley于大约1249年出生在英国爾时，她的父亲James de Audley Justiciar of Ireland30岁，母亲Ela de Longespée27岁。她于1274年与John Del Holte II结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她埋葬在英国斯塔福爾。

nameMeanings.name: Audley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Audley in Staffordshire, named from the Old English female personal name Aldgȳth + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Audley was born about 1249, in Cheshire, England, her father, James de Audley Justiciar of Ireland, was 30 and her mother, Ela de Longespée, was 27. She married John Del Holte II in 1274. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She was buried in Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Audley est née environ 1249, à Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, James de Audley Justiciar of Ireland, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Ela de Longespée, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé John Del Holte II en 1274. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elleenterrée à Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Audley um 1249 in Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James de Audley Justiciar of Ireland 30 und ihre Mutter Ela de Longespée 27. Sie hat 1274 John Del Holte II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie wurde in Staffordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Audley è nata il circa 1249 nel Cheshire, England, sua padre, James de Audley Justiciar of Ireland, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Ela de Longespée, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato John Del Holte II nel 1274. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Fu sepolta a Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Audleyが約1249年にイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父James de Audley Justiciar of Irelandは30歳，母Ela de Longespéeは27歳であった。1274年にJohn Del Holte IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリススタフォードシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Audley(이)가 대략 1249년 영국 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James de Audley Justiciar of Ireland(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ela de Longespée(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1274년 John Del Holte II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 스태퍼드실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Audley nasceu aproximadamente 1249, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, James de Audley Justiciar of Ireland, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Ela de Longespée, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com John Del Holte II em 1274. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela foi sepultada em Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Audley родилась около 1249 г. в местности чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени James de Audley Justiciar of Ireland было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Ela de Longespée, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Del Holte II в 1274 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она была похоронена в местности стаффордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Audley nació aproximadamente 1249, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, James de Audley Justiciar of Ireland, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Ela de Longespée, tenía 27 años. Se casó con John Del Holte II en 1274. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Fue sepultada en Staffordshire, Inglaterra.
